title: Create three React UI files for Development Department plugin
job:
Create three React UI files for the Development Department plugin.

1. Create plugins/dev-department/src/ui/index.tsx:
Import React. Import DepartmentView from ./components/DepartmentView. Export DepartmentSidebar and PhasesTab components that render DepartmentView. These are the export names from the plugin manifest.

2. Create plugins/dev-department/src/ui/components/DepartmentView.tsx:
A React component showing either project list or project detail. Use useState for list vs detail mode. List mode: project names with status badges, Create Project button. Detail mode: ProjectHeader, PhaseList, back button. Basic HTML with inline styles.

3. Create plugins/dev-department/src/ui/components/ProjectHeader.tsx:
Displays project name (editable input), objective (editable textarea), status dropdown (Draft, Active, Blocked, Archived), active phase indicator. Save and Cancel buttons. Props: project data and onSave callback.

TypeScript throughout. Import types from ../../worker/types. Commit all three files.
